title: centaurea scabiosa var. variifolia
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. variifolia, commonly known as the pin-cushion flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea scabiosa var. variifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
